label_notes: Source: training knowledge. NYT relies on both subscription and advertising revenue, resulting in extensive data collection for targeted advertising. Collects detailed reading behavior for content personalization and ad targeting. Large-scale tracking across NYT properties. Verify current policies on AI training with news content and specific ad partner relationships.
